This Privacy Notice explains how Careem Networks FZ LLC and/or its Affiliates (collectively â€œCareemâ€, â€œweâ€ or â€œusâ€) collects and uses Personal Data. The Notice applies to all users of Careemâ€™s mobile applications, websites, call-centre or technology (collectively, the â€œCareem Platformâ€), users of any other products and services we provide, and when users interact or communicate with us (all collectively, the â€œServicesâ€). Our Privacy practices relating to Hala Users in the United Arab Emirates, Guest Users and Visitors are detailed in Sections 11 to 14.

By accessing or using the Services, you confirm that you have read this Privacy Notice in full and understand that information collected by Careem in accordance with this Privacy Notice may be used in accordance with Applicable Laws, this Privacy Notice and our End User or Captain Terms of Use.

Unless stated otherwise, Careem Networks FZ LLC (3903, Shatha Tower, Dubai Media City, Dubai, United Arab Emirates) is the data controller for the Personal Data collected in connection with the use of Careemâ€™s Services.
1. Scope and Application

Scope and Application

This Privacy Notice applies to all individuals anywhere in the world who access or use our Services. It specifically applies to:Bike Users:individuals that book a trip on a Careem BIKE.Captains:individuals that provide (or submit the application to provide) transportation of people or goods, whether individually or through partner transportation companies.Delivery Recipients:individuals that purchase or receive a Product sold by a Merchant Partner, including via Careem Food and Shops.Express Users:

companies that rely on Careem Express solutions for the delivery of goods sold through platforms other than the Careem Platform.OA Users:individuals that request the pick up or receive products, other than Express Users.PAY Users:individuals that make use of PAY services such as, sending or receiving money through Careem PAY (including to purchase goods and services from E-Commerce Partners) and paying for utility bills.Riders

: individuals that request or receive transportation, including those that receive transportation requested by another individual.Super App Users: individuals that purchase services from a Merchant Partner through the Careem Platform, such as home cleaning services.(each referred to in this Privacy Notice as â€œyouâ€ or "Data Subject"as the context requires).Across this Notice, we will be using some important definitions:Affiliates

means: (i) any entity where Careem Networks FZ LLC, directly or indirectly, through one or more intermediaries, holds at least 25% of the equity or 25% of the voting rights; and (ii) any subsidiary or affiliate of such entity in (i). It also includes our legal representatives, administrators, successors-in-interest and permitted assigns.Applicable Law

means any law that applies to our processing of your Personal Data, whether by virtue of offering Services to you, monitoring your behaviour online (such as by using Cookies), your using of our Services or the provision of your services to us.ECommerce Partners:a third party that enable Captains and/or End Users to pay for goods or services on their websites using Careem Pay technology.End Usersrefers to Riders, Delivery Recipients, OA Recipients, Super App Users, Bike Users and PAY Users.Personal Data

is any data or information that relates to an individual and which could, of itself or in combination with other data or information, identify who an individual is.Productsare any goods or services displayed on the Careem Platform.Merchant Partneris a third party that makes available the delivery of goods, restaurant meals or services through the Careem Platform.Process or Processingmeans the collection, storage, use or transfer of Personal Data.Terms of Usemeans the Customer or Captain Terms of Use.

2. Collection of InformationDepending on the Services you are accessing or using, we collect and use:A. Information that you provide directly to us;B. Information about the use of your account and our Services;C. Information obtained from other sources and third parties, which may include information about you.

3. Use of Personal DataEnd Users and CaptainsWe may use Personal Data collected in the manners described above to:Provide, maintain, and improve our ServicesPerform internal administration and operations, including to conduct data analysis, testing, and research; to monitor and analyze usage and activity trends; and to troubleshoot software bugs and operational problems

Send or facilitate communications (i) between End Users and Captains, such as estimated times of arrival (ETAs), or (ii) at your direction, between you and a contact of yours in connection with your use of certain features, such as referrals or invites;Send you communications to you, including administrative or Service-related messages, receipts and other communications we think will be of interest to you, including information about existing and/or new products, services, promotions, news, and events of Careem and other companies, where permissible and according to Applicable Laws;

Process contest, sweepstake, or other promotion entries and fulfill any related awards;Allow you to participate in interactive features of our Services;Keep our Services safe and secure, including screening Captains and End Users before enabling their use of our Services and at subsequent intervals, including through reviews of background checks, where permitted by law, to help prevent use of our services by unsafe Captains and/or End Users;

Prevent, detect, and combat fraud or unsafe activities, including by using device, location, profile, usage, and other data;Personalize and improve the Services, including to provide or recommend features, content, social connections, referrals, and advertisements;Using End User and Captain ratings and feedback to encourage compliance with Careemâ€™s Terms of Use and as grounds for deactivating Captains with low ratings or who otherwise violated such guidelines in certain countries;

Locate you if you use the alert button within the Careem mobile application; andTo ask you about your experience using our Services, including about a particular Captain.Captains onlyWe may use Personal Data collected in the manners described above to:

In certain regions, using information derived from the Captainâ€™s license photos, and other photos submitted to Careem, for safety and security purposes. This includes a real-time ID feature, which prompts you to share a selfie before going online or while online to help ensure that the individual using our app matches the Captain account we have on file. This also includes comparing photographs that we have on file against photographs (i) of other users to prevent identity-borrowing, and (ii) from public databases to verify user identity; and
Offer, obtain, provide, or facilitate insurance, vehicle, invoicing or financing solutions.
4. Sharing of Personal DataDepending upon the purposes for which we have collected your Personal Data, we may share your Personal Data:

End Users and CaptainsWe may share your Personal Data:With Careem Affiliates;With third parties that we use to carry out work on our behalf or to perform a contract we enter into with them,    including:Google, in connection with the use of Google Maps in Careem Platform (see Google's privacy policy for        information on their collection and use of data).social media companies, including Facebook, in connection with Careem's use of their tools in the Careem

Platform (see Facebook's privacy policy for information on their collection and use of data);vendors who help us verify identity, background information, or who screen users in connection with sanctions,        anti-money laundering, fraud or know-your-customer requirements. In some cases, these service providers may        retain        identity documents that are suspected to be fraudulent for the purpose of identifying fraud in the future;cloud storage providers;

payment processors and facilitators;marketing partners and marketing platform providers, including social media advertising services, advertising        networks, third-party data providers, and other service providers that help us understand you better as a user        and        measure advertising effectiveness;research partners, including those performing surveys or research projects in partnership with Careem or on        Careem's behalf;

vendors that assist Careem to enhance the safety and security of our Services;consultants, lawyers, accountants, and other professional service providers;airports, including when required by airport authorities as a condition of operating on airport property;telecommunications companies, utility providers and other third parties to offer to you and enable you to buy        prepaid services or pay for postpaid services you obtain from them;

e-Commerce providers to enable to you to purchase goods and services from them through Careem PAY.financing partners; andfinancial institutions, such as banks we partner with to offer joint products.With third parties where you choose to pay bills as part of our Careem Pay services;With financial institutions that we have partnered with to provide the Careem Pay service;With third parties to market their products or services to you if you have agreed to receive promotional updates;

If we otherwise notify you and you consent to the sharing;With third parties in an aggregated and/or anonymized form which cannot reasonably be used to identify you;With law enforcement officials, financial regulators, anti money laundering agencies, government authorities, public    health officials, competent authorities or other third parties: (i) to enforce or apply our Terms of Use; (ii) to

investigate potential breaches of these terms or applicable laws or if we believe your actions are inconsistent with    our Terms of Use; (iii) to protect the rights, property, or safety of Careem or others; or (iv) if we believe    disclosure is in accordance with, or is otherwise required by any applicable law, regulation, operating license or    agreement, legal process or governmental requests, or where the disclosure is otherwise appropriate due to safety or    similar concern;

With a claims processor or an insurer to provide any necessary information (including your contact information) if    there is a complaint, dispute or conflict, which may include an accident, involving you and another party and such    information or data is necessary to resolve the complaint, dispute or conflict; andWith third parties in connection with, or during negotiations of, any merger, sale of company assets, consolidation
or restructuring, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of our business by or into another company.

End Users onlyWe may share your Personal Data:At your request, such as when you agree to share your ETA and location with a friend;With Captains, to enable them to provide the Services you request. For example, we share your name and pickup and/or drop-off locations with Captains;

With Merchant Partners and/or their point-of-sale providers for order fulfillment, delivery, communications and marketing purposes. In some cases, including when the Merchant Partner is self-delivering the Order to you, we will provide your information to that Merchant Partner in a similar manner as if you had placed the order for Services directly with the Merchant Partner;

With third parties to provide you with a service you requested, including bill payment services and services that you may have requested through a partnership or promotional offering made by a third party or us;With third parties with whom you choose to let us share your Personal Data, including other applications or websites that integrate with our API or Services, or those with an API or service with which we integrate;With Hala in the manner identified in this Privacy Notice; or
With your employer (or similar entity) if your employer participates in any of our enterprise/corporate solutions.

Captains onlyWith End Users, to enable them to identify you and your vehicle;With any Merchant which you are collecting an order on behalf of an End User;With your employer or the third-party transportation company your Captain account is associated with; andWith insurance companies or providers of fleet financing solutions whose product offerings we consider may be of interest to you.

5. Automated decision takingWe use personal data to make automated decisions relating to use of our Services, such as to:Determine Captains and End Users ratings, and deactivating where there are low ratings;Match available Captains to End Users requesting services based on availability, proximity, and other factors;

Enable dynamic pricing, in which the price of a ride or the delivery fee is determined based on constantly varying factors such as the estimated time and distance, the predicted route, estimated traffic, and the number of Captains and End Users using Careem at a given moment; andFlag Captains and/or End Users who are identified as having engaged in fraud, unsafe activity, or other activities that may harm Careem and/or others.

Careem performs the above activities on the grounds that they are necessary to fulfill our obligations to users under our Terms of Use or other agreements with users, or on the grounds that they are necessary for purposes of the legitimate interests of Careem, its users and others.

6. International Transfer of Personal DataReflecting the regional span of our business, we process personal data globally. This means we may also transfer personal data to countries other than the one where you live or use Careemâ€™s Services. When we transfer your Personal Data abroad, we will take appropriate measures to protect your Personal Data in accordance with this Privacy Notice and the laws of the country from where the transfer is occurring.

Where Applicable Laws require you to consent to the processing of personal data outside the country where you access the Careem Platform, you provide that consent to us by continuing to book the ride or using our Services to the fullest extent possible under the Applicable Laws.

7. Storage of Personal DataWe will store and retain your Personal Data for the period of time necessary for the purpose for                    which the data has been collected, unless the nature of the purpose changes in which case the                    retention period may be extended or shortened.Apart from the purposes for which we collect your Personal Data, we also store and retain this                    Personal Data to preserve the integrity of our databases, to carry out on-going Services on your

behalf, for research, analytics and statistics purposes and to ensure compliance with applicable                    laws and regulations.Following an account deletion request (where warranted in accordance with the data subject rights                    referred to below), we will erase or archive from active use the Personal Data of the individual to                    which the requirement or request relates, unless we are required to retain it due to legal or

regulatory requirements, for purposes of safety, security, and fraud prevention, or because of an                    issue relating to your account such as an outstanding credit or an unresolved claim or dispute.
8. Your Choices

1. Device permissionsMost mobile device platforms (iOS, Android, etc.) have defined certain types of device data that                    apps cannot access without the device ownerâ€™s permission. Different platforms have different methods                    for how that permission can be obtained. Please check the available settings on your device or check                    with your provider.

2. Marketing and Opting OutIn some countries we cannot provide you with any direct marketing communications unless we have                    obtained your express consent to do so in advance.In all cases, Careem provides End Users and Captains the opportunity to opt-out of receiving direct                    marketing communications from us and our partners:in any direct email marketing communication that you receive from us; andfor End Users, from the â€˜Settingsâ€™ menu in the Careem application.

3. Data Subject RightsIf you would like Careem to correct personal data Careem holds about you, please readhere.                    This enables you to have any incomplete or inaccurate information Careem holds about you corrected.If you decide to deactivate your account, you may reach out to ushere.                    Please note that if you are a Captain, additional steps may be required to give effect to this                    request.

Depending upon which country you are in at the time that we collect and use your Personal Data and                    the Service that you make use of you may have some or all of the following rights under applicable                    law:To request access to your data, including your profile data and trip or order history (commonly                      known as a                      "data subject access request"). If the information you request reveals personal data about a third

party, we will: (i) seek that individual's consent before responding to your request, (ii)                      consider if it is                      otherwise reasonable to provide it to you; or (iii) we will redact third parties' personal data                      before                      responding. If we are unable to provide you with access to your personal data because disclosure                      would infringe

the rights and freedoms of third parties, we will notify you of this decision.To request erasure of your Personal Data. This enables you to ask Careem to erase Personal Data                      where:your Personal Data is no longer needed for the purposes for which                          it was                          collected;the sole legal ground for processing was your consent and you have                          withdrawn it;

you have objected to processing of your Personal Data on the legal                          grounds                          relating to your particular                          situation, and Careem cannot prove that there are overriding legitimate interests for                          processing;your Personal Data were processed unlawfully; oryour Personal Data must be erased in order to comply with legal                          requirements.

Before requesting to delete an account, you are required to complete/cancel and active or schedule                    orders or bookings, cancel any Careem Plus or Bike subscriptions and empty your Careem PAY wallet.                    If you are the end user of an enterprise/corporate account, we may be unable to process your                    deletion request if there are outstanding payments for that enterprise account.

After we receive your erasure request, you will be logged out of your Careem account. We will                    process your request within 90 days. If you log in your Careem Account during these 90 days, your                    deletion account will be cancelled and your account will remain unchanged.Careem may be required to retain some data in line with legal or regulatory requirements, for

purposes of safety, security, and fraud prevention, or because of an issue relating to your account                    such as an outstanding credit or an unresolved claim or dispute.To object to us processing of your Personal Data where Careem is relying on a legitimate                        interest (or those of a                        third party) and there is something about your particular situation which makes you want to                        object to processing

on this ground.To request us to restrict our processing of your Personal Data where:you consider that our processing of your Personal Data is                          inaccurate;you consider that the processing is unlawful and you oppose the                          erasure of your Personal Data and you require                          the restriction of the processing instead;we no longer need the Personal Data for the purposes of the

processing but the Personal Data is required by                          you for the establishment, exercise or defence of a legal claim; orwhere you require verification that processing on the legitimate                          interests of Careem override your interests.To revoke your consent, where we have expressly asked for your consent as a legal basis to                        process your Personal

Data. The revocation of your consent will not affect the lawfulness of the processing based on                        your prior consent.Depending on your location or the version of the Careem application that you are using, you may                    exercise these rights through the Settings menu in the Careem app or by contacting ushere.We will contact you for additional information if we are unable to verify your identity, the scope

of your request is unclear or does not provide sufficient information for us to conduct a search                    (for example, this will be the case if you request â€œall information about meâ€). Once we have all the                    information, we need to locate your personal data, we will begin processing your request.Applicable law may allow or require us to refuse to act on your request, or we may have destroyed,

erased, or made your personal data anonymous in accordance with our record retention obligations and                    practices. If we determine that your request does not have a legal basis, we reserve the right to                    not further process your request and we will inform you of this decision.In addition, depending on your location, you may have the right to file a complaint relating to our
handling of your Personal Data with the data protection authority in your country.

9. Security PrecautionsYour Careem profile is password-protected so that only you and authorized Careem employees or                    service providers (â€œAuthorised Personnelâ€) have access to your account                    information. Careemâ€™s Authorised Personnel will never proactively reach out to you and ask for any                    personal account information, including your password.Careem makes every effort to ensure that your Personal Data is secure on its systems. Careem has

colleagues dedicated to maintaining adherence to this Privacy Notice and other privacy initiatives,                    periodically reviewing security of our Services and making sure that all Careem colleagues are aware                    of our security practices. Unfortunately, no data transmission over the Internet can be guaranteed                    to be 100% secure. As a result, Careem cannot guarantee the security of any Personal Data you

transmit to us, and you do so at your own risk. If you have any further questions on this issue,                    refer to the Terms of Use. To the extent permitted by Applicable Law, Careem expressly disclaims any                    liability, and you hereby waive any claims, and indemnify us for any claims that may be brought by                    third parties who access or use our Services via your account, that may arise should any other
individuals obtain the Personal Data Careem collects about you or third parties who access or use                    our Services via your account.

10. CookiesCookies are small text files that are stored on browsers or devices by websites, apps, online                    media, and advertisements. We use cookies and similar technologies for purposes such as:distinguishing you from other users of on the Careem Platform;remembering your preferences and settingsunderstanding the online behaviors and interests of people who interact with our Services,                      including determining the popularity of content and analysing site traffic and trends

improving our Careem Platform and the Services we provideWe may also allow others to provide audience measurement and analytics services for us, to serve                    advertisements on our behalf across the Internet, and to track and report on the performance of                    those advertisements. These entities may use cookies, web beacons, SDKs, and other technologies to                    identify the devices used by visitors to our websites, as well as when they visit other online sites
and services.

12. Guest UsersWe consider you a Guest User if you receive trips or deliveries but are not the owner of an account                    with Careem, such as when:You purchase physical products from third parties (including restaurants, ecommerce platforms or                      other merchants) that use the Careem Platform for the delivery of the physical products to you.You request a trip or delivery via partner websites or apps such as ride-hailing aggregators.

Your location is marked as a pickup or drop off location for our Order Anything services.A trip or delivery is arranged by another account owner.When a Careem User transfers money to you.Guest User personal data may be associated with, and accessible by, the owner of the Careem                    account.In these cases, your personal data is used and may be shared with third parties: (i) to provide

such trips, deliveries or to enable such transfers; and (ii) for purposes of safety and security,                    customer support, research and development, enabling communication between users, and in connection                    with legal proceedings and requirements.

13. SuppliersWe consider you as a Supplier if you are an individual (not Captains) that provide services to                    Careem, either in their own capacity, or on behalf of an organization as a member or employee of                    that organization.If you are a Supplier or work for a Supplier, we collect Personal Data when you, or the business                    you represent provides, or seeks to provide us with, services; or otherwise communicate with us.

The Personal Data collected during may include:your name;your email address;your phone number;your postal address;passport or national identification number;bank information where payment for Services will be made;information on shareholders, principal officers, financial history, references, and ultimate                      beneficial owners; andother information which we reasonably require or that you choose to provide.We may use Personal Data collected in the manners described above to:

To contact you with regards to the provision of your services to us; andTo facilitate payments to you; andTo consider our potential or current relationship with your business.If you are a Supplier we will be relying on third parties who help us verify identity and                    background information for legal, regulatory, anti-money laundering, sanctions and security                    purposes. This can include screening against sanctions lists, lists of politically exposed persons

and relatives/close associates of such persons, and adverse media.Please note that if you choose not to provide us with some of this Personal Data, or request that                    we erase some or all of it, we may not be able to engage you or continue to engage you to provide                    services to us.

14. VisitorsWe consider you as a Visitor if you visit Careem premises other than as a Careem employee or                    individual contractor. When visiting Careem premises, you may be asked to input personal information                    and register as a visitor using a visitor management system. During this registration, you may be                    also asked to sign a non-disclosure agreement.This information is used to ensure the safety of individuals within Careem premises and to
safeguard information that is shared with you during your visit at Careem premises.

15. Changes to this Privacy NoticeWe may change this Privacy Notice from time to time. If we make significant changes in the way we                    treat your Personal Data, or to the Privacy Notice, we will provide you notice through the Services                    or by some other means, such as email or a push notification.To the extent permitted by Applicable Law, your continued use of the Services after such notice

constitutes your consent to the changes to the extent permitted by law.We encourage you to periodically review this Privacy Notice for the latest information on our                    privacy practices.

16.
